# Heliski Travel

> Heliski Travel is the authorised booking agent for Viking Heliskiing on the Troll Peninsula in Siglufjörður, North Iceland. We arrange 3, 4 and 5-day helicopter skiing weeks with IFMGA-certified guides, based at the 4-star Sigló Hótel. Enquiries are answered within 12 hours.

Key facts: impartial booking agent and concierge (not the helicopter operator); operator partner is Viking Heliskiing; base is the 4-star Sigló Hótel in Siglufjörður (Troll Peninsula, North Iceland); IFMGA-certified guides; sea-to-summit Arctic descents up to ~1,500 m vertical per run; season March–June; suitable from strong intermediate to expert.

## Packages

- [Heliski Packages](https://heliskitravel.com/packages/): Overview of all Iceland heliskiing weeks — 3, 4 and 5-day options, what's included, and how to choose.
- [Classic Heliskiing](https://heliskitravel.com/classic-heliskiing/): The flagship shared-group heliski week on the Troll Peninsula with guaranteed vertical.
- [Heli-Assisted Touring](https://heliskitravel.com/heli-assisted-touring/): Ski-touring ascents combined with helicopter lifts for a bigger, quieter backcountry day.
- [Private Heliskiing](https://heliskitravel.com/private-heliskiing/): Fully private helicopter and guide for your own group, on your own schedule.

## Planning & basecamp

- [Iceland Heliskiing Guide](https://heliskitravel.com/iceland/): The complete guide — how to get there, best time to ski, cost, safety, terrain and what to expect.
- [Sigló Hótel](https://heliskitravel.com/siglo-hotel/): The 4-star harbour hotel that serves as basecamp — rooms, dining and location.
- [Travel Here](https://heliskitravel.com/travel-here/): Getting to Siglufjörður and North Iceland, logistics and transfers.
- [Gallery](https://heliskitravel.com/gallery/): Photography from the Troll Peninsula — terrain, guiding and the lodge experience.

## Field notes (guides)

- [Field Notes hub](https://heliskitravel.com/field-notes/): Index of all heliskiing guides and destination comparisons.
- [How much does heliskiing cost](https://heliskitravel.com/field-notes/how-much-does-heliskiing-cost/): What a heliski trip actually costs and what drives the price.
- [Best time to go heliskiing](https://heliskitravel.com/field-notes/best-time-to-go-heliskiing/): Month-by-month conditions and when to book.
- [Is heliskiing safe](https://heliskitravel.com/field-notes/is-heliskiing-safe/): Avalanche protocol, guiding standards and how risk is managed.
- [Heliskiing for beginners](https://heliskitravel.com/field-notes/heliskiing-for-beginners/): Whether you're ready, ability requirements and first-timer advice.
- [What to pack for heliskiing](https://heliskitravel.com/field-notes/what-to-pack-for-heliskiing/): Gear, clothing and equipment checklist.
- [Iceland vs Alaska heliskiing](https://heliskitravel.com/field-notes/heliskiing-iceland-vs-alaska/): How Iceland's terrain and experience compare to Alaska.
- [Iceland vs Canada heliskiing](https://heliskitravel.com/field-notes/heliskiing-iceland-vs-canada/): Iceland compared to British Columbia and the Canadian heliski scene.
- [Best heliskiing destinations in the world](https://heliskitravel.com/field-notes/best-heliskiing-destinations-world/): How the world's top heliski regions stack up.
- [How to book a heliski trip](https://heliskitravel.com/field-notes/how-to-book-a-heliski-trip/): Step-by-step booking process and timeline.
- [Why book through an agent](https://heliskitravel.com/field-notes/why-book-heliskiing-through-an-agent/): The value an impartial agent adds versus booking direct.
- [Viking Heliskiing guide](https://heliskitravel.com/field-notes/viking-heliskiing-guide/): About our operator partner on the Troll Peninsula.
- [Siglufjörður travel guide](https://heliskitravel.com/field-notes/siglufjordur-travel-guide/): The town, the fjord and the basecamp region.

## Company

- [About Heliski Travel](https://heliskitravel.com/about/): Who we are, our role as an authorised agent, and Vegard Knudsen.
- [Contact](https://heliskitravel.com/contact/): Enquire about a trip — answered within 12 hours.
